business.headline: Sensex jumps 1,200 points: 3 reasons why stock market is rising todayAt around 9:48 am, the BSE Sensex was up 1,217.31 points, or 1.58%, at 78,064.88. It opened at 77,981.10 and touched a high of 78,270.42, while the low stood at 77,849.52.
Sensex, Nifty open higher on hopes of renewed US-Iran talksThe S&P BSE Sensex was up 1,189.51 points to 78,037.08, while the NSE Nifty50 rose 366.40 points to 24,209.05 as of 9:26 am.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market open higher or lower today?Early signals suggest a positive opening. GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 24,228 at 7:34 am. This points to the Nifty 50 opening around 1.6% higher than its last close of 23,842.65 on Monday. Domestic markets were shut on Tuesday due to a public holiday.

Supreme Court closes Sandesara fraud case after Rs 5,000 crore settlementDuring the proceedings, the Sandesara Group paid Rs 3,507 crore directly to the lending consortium, while an additional Rs 1,192 crore was recovered through liquidation. In its compliance order dated December 17, 2025, the Supreme Court recorded a final settlement deposit of Rs 5,111.43 crore.

War-led energy crisis could drag global growth to 2%: IMFAs conflict in West Asia deepens, the IMF warns energy shocks could push global growth toward near-recession levels, exposing fragile economies while inflation remains stubbornly elevated across markets.

IMF raises India FY27 GDP to 6.5% despite global conflict headwindsOne of the key reasons behind the improved outlook is a reduction in additional US tariffs on Indian goods. These tariffs have come down from 50% to 10%, easing pressure on exports.
EPFO new rule: Members can delink wrong Member IDs from UANThe updated system is expected to reduce confusion caused by duplicate or incorrect provident fund accounts.

IEA slashes oil demand and supply view as Iran war rattles markets: ReportThe ongoing conflict in Iran has forced the IEA to revise global oil market predictions, signalling reduced supply and demand growth amid geopolitical tensions.

SIPs are rising, but is retail conviction in equities slowing? Here's the answerRecord SIP numbers suggest confidence, yet other signals point to caution. Retail investors are not exiting equities — they are simply investing with greater care and clarity.

New TRACES portal launched: How will it change your TDS filing experience?The Income Tax Department has rolled out a new TRACES portal aimed at improving usability and speeding up processes. But how much difference will it actually make to your TDS filing experience?

Earn Rs 12 lakh or Rs 30 lakh? See how your gratuity changes with 50% basic payIn Part 1, we explained how take-home may fall despite the same CTC. Here, we look at how the 50% rule impacts long-term benefits like gratuity.

Unclaimed assets: How to recover your money from banks, shares, EPF and insuranceUnclaimed money is not lost, but recovering it requires awareness, documentation and persistence, making early action crucial before delays and low returns quietly erode its real value over time.

Markets fall, Adani Power hits all-time high: What's driving the surge?Adani Power's rally highlights how strong demand outlook and defensive positioning can drive select stocks higher, even as broader markets struggle with uncertainty and lack of sustained momentum.

From April to March: Here are all the key FY27 tax deadlines you must trackThe tax calendar may seem long, but staying aware of these dates can make things much simpler. Instead of rushing at the last minute, spreading out your compliance and investments across the year can help you avoid stress and penalties.

Gold down over Rs 1,200, silver slips Rs 6,000: Is this a dip worth buying?Precious metals have slipped noticeably, with gold and silver both under pressure. For investors, this raises a familiar dilemma, i.e., is this the right moment to step in or stay on the sidelines?

Motherson clarifies on Noida workers' protest, says driven by misinformationIn a filing to stock exchanges, the company said recent developments reported in the media relate to labour protests in Noida and some other cities, and are not specific to any one company.

Retail inflation rises to 3.40% in March from 3.21% in FebruaryThe year-on-year inflation rate, based on All India Consumer Price Index (CPI), stood at 3.40% (Provisional) in March 2026. This is slightly higher than February's 3.21%, but still below the 4% mark that is often seen as manageable.

8th Pay Commission meetings: Should govt employees expect a pay revision soon?After months of speculation, the 8th Pay Commission process has picked up pace. With meetings now scheduled, the big question remains, i.e., should government employees expect a pay revision anytime soon?

Sensex ends 700 points lower, Nifty below 23,900; auto stocks hit hardMarkets may have steadied after early losses, but rising oil prices and geopolitical risks continue to cloud sentiment, keeping investors cautious and leaving the near-term outlook uncertain and volatile.

Maruti, Eicher Motors, other auto stocks tumble: What's behind the fall?Maruti Suzuki fell over 4%, while Eicher Motors dropped nearly 5%, making them among the top losers on the Nifty 50. Other auto names also saw weakness, even as the broader market pared some of its early losses.

entertainment.headline: Yash breaks down Toxic in first interview: Not your typical gangster-action film In his first interview for Toxic, Yash hints at a layered, ambitious film with unexpected depth. At CinemaCon 2026, he also discusses Indian cinema's global evolution, and what the world can expect from us.

Passenger trailer makes you rethink road trips with its chilling horror. Watch The trailer for the much-awaited horror film Passenger has been unveiled, showcasing a terrifying story of a couple chased by a demonic entity after a fatal accident. Directed by Andre Ovredal, the film is set to release in cinemas on May 22.

Jana Nayagan, Sikandar and more: Films leaked before first day first show Vijay's Jana Nayagan leak has again brought to focus a malady that seems to have no cure. We look at some of the biggest pre-release leaks, even as the industry continues facing security and control woes.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 27: Bigger 4th Tuesday than Monday for Ranveer's film Dhurandhar 2 showed a surprising jump on Day 27, with its fourth Tuesday outperforming Monday. Can Ranveer Singh's blockbuster hold steady with new competition arriving?

Euphoria Season 3 review: Bigger, bolder and unnecessaryRelease Date:Sat Apr 12, 2025 Euphoria Season 3 shifts its characters into adulthood with bigger ideas, but often loses emotional clarity along the way. Despite strong performances, especially from Zendaya, the season feels more distant than impactful.

Sarabhai actor Rajesh Kumar calls out class system on film sets, star insecurity Actor Rajesh Kumar opened up about the class system on film sets, saying only a few voices shape decisions while others are sidelined. He also spoke about insecurity among lead actors and recalled how the lack of rehearsals and interaction affects performances.

Trisha shares her pet dog posts after hoax bomb call at her Chennai home Actor Trisha Krishnan's Chennai home received a second bomb threat in six months, confirmed as a hoax by local police. Despite the scare, Trisha remained calm and active on social media.

Adivi Sesh on Dacoit, what pan-India means to him and why he writes his own stories Adivi Sesh's new film Dacoit blends love and revenge. The actor shared insights on his creative freedom, pan-India appeal and the joy of writing his own stories to offer fresh narratives to viewers.

Tribute to Asha Bhosle, Lata Mangeshkar: Family plans 1000-bed mega hospital Late singers Asha Bhosle and Lata Mangeshkar's brother Hridaynath Mangeshkar announced plans to build Asia's largest hospital. The state-of-the-art facility will be a lasting tribute to the legendary sisters' legacy.

Explained: Why Vijay's Jana Nayagan couldn't have been leaked from editing table Soon after Vijay's Jana Nayagan was leaked, the needle of suspicion pointed at the film's editor. While the edit table is often blamed in such cases, the technical reality is far more complex, say senior film editors.

Ram Charan says he 'thoroughly enjoyed' Dacoit, praises Adivi Sesh- Mrunal Thakur Actor Ram Charan has praised the performances of Adivi Sesh and Mrunal Thakur in Dacoit, highlighting the film's strong cast and technical backing. The actor also acknowledged the team behind the project.

TXT turn reflective with 7TH YEAR: K-pop group's most personal album yet TXT's 7TH YEAR: A Moment of Stillness in the Thorns sees the group take a quieter, more reflective turn as they look back on their journey. Across six tracks, TXT explores anxiety, relationships and growth.
Harvey Weinstein retrial begins in New York with new evidence twist in rape case Harvey Weinstein retrial begins in New York with new evidence twist in rape case

Samay Raina shares unseen apology clips from dark phase, says felt like a corpse Comedian Samay Raina opened up about his toughest phase during the India's Got Latent row. He also revealed he recorded several apology videos he never shared online.

Varun Dhawan claps back at influencer alleging fake reviews for Hai Jawani teaser A social media row broke out after a Delhi-based influencer accused actor Varun Dhawan of orchestrating fake reviews for the teaser of his upcoming film, Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai. The actor responded to the claims, triggering a public exchange that has drawn attention.

Is Ranveer Singh's ad with Prakash Padukone a dig at Dhruv Rathee? Fans think so Actor Ranveer Singh's new ad with father-in-law Prakash Padukone is going viral, with fans spotting a cheeky Dhruv Rathee nod. Meanwhile, the Dhurandhar franchise is smashing records, having crossed Rs 3,000 crore worldwide.

Nani reveals he wouldn't have produced Adivi Sesh's Dacoit. Here's why Actor Nani, in a promotional interview with Adivi Sesh, praised his recent film Dacoit, calling it better than his films Major and Goodachari.

Ram Charan calls himself a rough dad, praises Upasana for being the nurturer Actor Ram Charan has opened up about his parenting style, calling himself a 'rough dad' while describing wife Upasana Kamineni as the nurturing force in their family. The couple have a three-year-old daughter and welcomed twins earlier this year.

Yumi's Cells 3 first impression: Kim Go-eun makes a confident return Yumi's Cells 3 marks a vibrant and emotionally charged return, with a mix of humour and heartfelt moments through Kim Go-eun's relatable portrayal of Yumi. The new season introduces fresh romantic tensions and intriguing character dynamics.

general news.headline: ED raids Punjab university owned by AAP MP who replaced Raghav Chadha in Rajya SabhaAshok Mittal, a 61-year-old businessman and educationist who heads the Lovely Group, including the Lovely Professional University (LPU), was recently appointed the Aam Aadmi Party's deputy leader in the Rajya Sabha, replacing Raghav Chadha.

With several arrests made and a high-level probe underway, the case has drawn sharp reactions. Here's a breakdown of the allegations, the investigation, and the fallout.

Trump rules out extending ceasefire with Iran, calls deal a better optionDonald Trump said 'two amazing days' lie ahead as the US and Iran are expected to resume peace talks, expressing hope for a permanent deal rather than an extension of the ceasefire.

Will India's Gaganyaan launch in 2027? Isro says YES, reality suggests NOAt the heart of the concern lies a fundamental gap: India is yet to complete the two critical uncrewed test missions that must precede any human spaceflight. We look at the announced timeline and the ground reality.

Maharashtra teen arrested for sexually abusing minors, cops probe 350 obscene videosPolice claim that the accused, 19-year-old Ayan Ahmed Tanveer, sexually exploited the victims and filmed the acts without their consent, later using the videos to threaten and blackmail them.

Did Pakistan fail to pay? Confusion swirls over US-Iran talks hotel bill rowConflicting reports over unpaid hotel bills during US-Iran talks in Islamabad have sparked confusion and scrutiny, overshadowing Pakistan's diplomatic efforts, though officials and hotel management dispute the claims.

Great contributors to US: JD Vance's big praise for 'amazing' Indian-origin in-lawsJD Vance described his Indian-origin father-in-law as an 'amazing man' who embodies a commitment to putting American interests first.

Mumbai woman, Swiftie auto-driver's musical Black Space duet is too wholesome to missA Mumbai auto ride turned into a full-blown concert when a woman and her driver sang Blank Space together, creating a viral moment that's equal parts wholesome and unforgettable.

Sanctioned Chinese ship fails to break US blockade, reverses course to HormuzThe Chinese-owned tanker was among at least eight ships crossing the waterway on Tuesday, the first day of the US blockade. A US destroyer stopped two oil tankers attempting to leave the Iranian port of Chabahar on the Gulf of Oman on Tuesday, a US official said.

Watch: Police dog tackles, bites suspect after violent attack on attendant in USThe cops reportedly fired multiple non-lethal rounds at the man before eventually deploying a K9 unit. The police dog bit the suspect, giving the officers a chance to overpower him.
Trump says US-Iran war very close to ending, but warns 'we're not finished'Trump's latest remarks suggest the Iran conflict may be nearing an end, with diplomatic efforts currently underway.

Live: LPG carrier Jag Vikram reaches India days after transiting HormuzUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: The crisis around the Strait of Hormuz is deepening, with the US launching a sweeping naval blockade targeting ships linked to Iran. According to the US Central Command, over 10,000 American Marines, sailors and airmen, backed by warships and aircraft, are enforcing restrictions on vessels entering and leaving Iranian ports, with operations extending into the Gulf of Oman. US President Donald Trump has said the war is "very close to over" and claimed Tehran is keen to strike a deal, even as he warned of decisive action against any threats to the blockade. Iran has rejected the move as illegal and signalled it will not yield under pressure, placing its armed forces on high alert. The ripple effects are already visible, with oil prices surging past USD 100 per barrel and global powers including France, the United Kingdom and the European Union calling for de-escalation and the restoration of freedom of navigation. Meanwhile, ongoing hostilities involving Israel and Hezbollah in Lebanon continue to complicate diplomatic efforts, though US officials indicate backchannel talks are not entirely closed. Follow indiatoday.in for live updates.

Live: CBSE Class 10 result today? Official notice soonCBSE Board Class 10 Result 2026 Live Updates: The Central Board of Secondary Education is likely to announce the Class 10 results shortly, keeping over 25 lakh students on edge. Once released, students will be able to check their scores on official websites such as results.cbse.nic.in and cbse.gov.in. Recent signals from digital platforms suggest that the wait may soon be over. DigiLocker, the government's platform for storing and accessing official documents, has indicated that the results are expected soon. Similarly, the UMANG App has also hinted at an imminent release, further building anticipation among students and parents.

Can Singapore's latest fitness trend work for India's ageing population?Fitness for seniors is more about taking it easy. A bit of yoga, regular walks, and light stretching. But what if that very approach is limiting how well we age? Retirees in Singapore are taking a leap here and maybe Indians can take notes too.

Live: BIEAP results out, girls outshine boysBIEAP 1st, 2nd Year Result Live Updates: The Board of Intermediate Education, Andhra Pradesh (BIEAP) will declare the AP Inter 1st and 2nd Year Results 2026 today, April 15, at 10:31 am. Over 10.57 lakh students are awaiting their results. AP Inter Result 2026 will be available through SMS, DigiLocker, and the India Today Board Result 2026 page for easy access during peak traffic.

Read the tea leaves: India's kadak chai is losing to climate changeIndia's morning routine of sipping steaming chai is facing an existential crisis. In this week's edition of Climate On My Plate, let's have a look at how India's vast tea gardens are under stress from a warming planet.

Telugu speech therapist in UK fails to understand patients' English, gets firedAn Indian-origin speech and language therapist was fired from her job in the UK after failing to communicate and understand patients' English. The therapist claimed English as her first language and got her job, but was quickly caught for her lack of English proficiency.

Employee quits in 7 days over 'toxic behaviour,' HR denies salary on WhatsAppOn Reddit's r/IndianWorkplace, the employee shared a post titled, "Company refused to pay because I resigned within a week due to toxic behavior." The employee had joined a small firm with a team of around 20 people as a marketing executive at a salary of Rs 5.04 lakh per annum.

sports.headline: IPL 2026: RCB sweat on Virat Kohli's fitness, seek table-topping win vs LSG IPL 2026, RCB vs LSG: Virat Kohli will be in focus after his injury as Royal Challengers Bengaluru get set to lock horns with the Lucknow Super Giants on Wednesday at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium in Bengaluru.

KKR power coach Andre Russell could've done more than Rs 25 crore Cameron Green: Kaif Mohammad Kaif slammed KKR's decision to sideline Andre Russell and back Rs 25 crore Cameron Green after another loss, as the team remains winless in IPL 2026.

CSK vs KKR: How MS Dhoni's words sparked Noor Ahmad's turnaround at Chepauk CSK vs KKR: Noor Ahmad starred with 3/21 as CSK beat KKR, with bowling coach Sriram revealing how MS Dhoni's advice and Akeal Hosein's inputs helped the spinner find his rhythm at Chepauk.

Barcelona come undone as Atletico Madrid return to Champions League semifinals FC Barcelona's early dominance wasn't enough as Atletico Madrid advanced to the UEFA Champions League semifinals, continuing Barca's struggles in Europe after another knockout exit.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's code cracked by an IPL rookie. Will others follow? IPL 2026: SRH debutant Praful Hinge removed Vaibhav Sooryavanshi with a perfectly executed hard-length delivery, aimed squarely at a well-known vulnerability. The plan was no secret, but it was Hinge's precision and discipline that set him apart from others who had tried and failed.

Play of the Day: Ruturaj Gaikwad's Noor ploy scripts historic low for KKR Kolkata Knight Riders lost their fourth game of the IPL 2026 season after falling to Chennai Super Kings in Chepauk. While Noor won the Player of the Match award for his sensational spell, Ruturaj Gaikwad's captaincy perhaps did not get the accolades it deserved.

KKR woes deepen: Ajinkya Rahane fined after Chepauk loss to CSK Kolkata Knight Riders captain Ajinkya Rahane has been fined after his side maintained a slow over-rate during their 32-run defeat to Chennai Super Kings in the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026 at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai.

Barcelona vs Atletico: Fermin Lopez suffers horror injury in quarter-finals Fermin Lopez suffered a nasty facial injury after being struck by Juan Musso's boot during Barcelona's Champions League quarter-final clash against Atletico Madrid. The incident led to a lengthy stoppage as the midfielder received treatment on the pitch.

After CSK win two in a row, Ruturaj feels it's coming together for Chennai IPL 2026: Chennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad said it is "coming together slowly" for his side after the five-time IPL winners recorded a second consecutive win, beating Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs. Notably, CSK won two in a row for the first time since April 2024.

Yet to win a game, Ajinkya Rahane urges KKR to stay positive after loss vs CSK KKR captain Ajinkya Rahane had to face the broadcasters after the team remained winless in the Indian Premier League 2026. Chasing 193, KKR faltered in Chennai and lost the game by 32 runs.

Candidates Chess: R Vaishali draws with Zhongyi, stays in contention for the title Indian Grandmaster R Vaishali held her nerve to stay in the hunt for the title at the FIDE Women's Candidates Tournament 2026, playing out a crucial draw against China's Tan Zhongyi in the penultimate round on Tuesday.

Uzbekistan's Sindarov sets up World Championship title clash with GukeshUzbekistan's rising star Javokhir Sindarov stamped his authority on the global stage by winning the 2026 Candidates Chess Tournament on Tuesday, earning the right to challenge reigning world champion D Gukesh for the crown later this year.

New year, same old KKR as CSK apply spin choke at ChepaukIPL 2026, CSK vs KKR: Chennai Super Kings racked up back-to-back wins as they beat the Kolkata Knight Riders by 32 runs on Wednesday at the MA Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. With the defeat, KKR stayed winless and at the bottom of the table.

Javier Mascherano resigns as Inter Miami head coach after historic MLS Cup winJavier Mascherano has resigned as head coach of Inter Miami CF, just four months after leading the team to its first MLS Cup title. The club said the Argentine stepped down due to "personal reasons."

Rs 10,000 for a bus ride? USA sets ridiculous fares for FIFA World CupFIFA World Cup: The city of Boston has announced a paid bus service, the "Boston Stadium Express," for the FIFA World Cup 2026, costing Rs 8,840.90 per round trip to Gillette Stadium. The service, operated with Yankee Line, is part of broader concerns over rising costs and accessibility for fans attending the tournament.

Fast bowler Mayank Yadav fit to play against RCB, says Tom MoodyRCB vs LSG: Lucknow Super Giants have their best fast bowlers fit and ready for their next game against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. LSG could have the services of Mayank Yadav, one of India's fast bowlers, back for the RCB game.

US Soccer Federation sporting director leaves just two months before World CupMatt Crocker has resigned as the sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation just two months before the World Cup. He is set to take up a new role in Saudi Arabia, although details of the position have not been disclosed.

CSK's Ruturaj Gaikwad under pressure after fifth successive failure in IPL 2026Ruturaj Gaikwad's struggles in IPL 2026 continued as the Chennai Super Kings captain registered his fifth successive failure, managing just 63 runs in five innings and failing to provide solid starts at the top.

Premier League: Head coach Andoni Iraola to leave Bournemouth at end of seasonAndoni Iraola is set to leave AFC Bournemouth at the end of the season. The 43-year-old Spaniard guided the Cherries to a ninth-place finish in the Premier League last season, their highest-ever points tally in the competition.

No MS Dhoni for CSK, Varun Chakravarthy returns for KKR in ChennaiCSK vs KKR: Kolkata Knight Riders made a key change in their bowling attack in their away game against Chennai Super Kings on Tuesday. Varun Chakravarthy returned to the line-up at the expense of Navdeep Saini.

How MS Dhoni's success mantra became key to Ayush Mhatre's U-19 World Cup winAhead of his maiden Under-19 World Cup stint as captain, Ayush Mhatre sought guidance from MS Dhoni, whose advice on staying calm under pressure shaped India's title-winning campaign.

SRH bowling attack depleted further as star pacer gets ruled out of IPL 2026IPL 2026: SunRisers Hyderabad's bowling stocks were further depleted on Tuesday, after their star pacer Brydon Carse was ruled out of the tournament. SRH have signed a replacement for the player.

Fuel crisis in India? Mohsin Naqvi's bizarre excuse for empty PSL stands stuns reporterPCB chief Mohsin Naqvi has faced backlash after claiming India faces a petrol crisis, even as PSL matches continue behind closed doors due to Pakistan's earlier cited fuel concerns.

Virat Kohli injury update: RCB star trains in Bengaluru. Will he play vs LSG?IPL 2026: Virat Kohli trained on Tuesday, batting fluently in the nets as concerns over his ankle injury eased. The star batter is likely to feature in RCB's home game against Lucknow Super Giants on Wednesday.

IPL 2026: Will Jacks set to join Mumbai Indians after missing first four gamesEngland all-rounder Will Jacks is set to arrive in India later this week to link up with Mumbai Indians, having missed the franchise's first four matches of the IPL 2026 season following a busy international schedule.

Samson to struggle against Narine? Irfan Pathan points out stat ahead of CSK vs KKRIrfan Pathan believes Sanju Samson could struggle against Sunil Narine, citing his poor record and low strike rate against the spinner. However, Samson's recent return to form makes their battle crucial, especially on a Chepauk, where spin could play a key role.

Yamal and Simeone in war of words before Barcelona face Atletico in UCL clashBarcelona face an uphill battle against Atletico Madrid in the Champions League quarterfinal second leg. IPL: How Krunal Pandya's rare skill set helps him outthink T20 battersIn a format that favours batters, Krunal Pandya continues to show that skill still matters. On a high-scoring night at the Wankhede Stadium, where 240 felt just about enough, his spell stood out for the control he had.

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
